mapper.select: select e.*, u.display_name as uploaded_by_name from after_sale_evidence e left join user_account u on e.uploaded_by=u.id where e.application_id=#{applicationId} order by e.created_at desc, e.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into after_sale_evidence(application_id, evidence_type, file_url, content, uploaded_by) values(#{applicationId}, #{evidenceType}, #{fileUrl}, #{content}, #{uploadedBy})
